Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake parts content to feed into email generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active promotions, keeping messaging accurate and conversion-ready.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling daily marketing email using scraped R1 product data, including subject line, body copy, and CTAs.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates daily copywriting overhead and consistently produces on-brand, persuasive emails tailored to brake parts buyers.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content via API and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily send execution at scale, reaching the full contact list without manual scheduling or template building.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product data, friction materials, and current promotions to inform email content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds AI-generated emails in real product context, improving relevance and reducing the risk of inaccurate claims.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email for DFC's audience including subject line, product-focused body, and CTA.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, brand-consistent email content daily without requiring a dedicated copywriter.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-drafted DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures consistent daily outreach to DFC's customer base, driving repeat engagement and pipeline without manual effort.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer message, contact history, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for AI processing, ensuring no ticket is missed or delayed.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time significantly, allowing support staff to focus on resolution rather than composition.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for agent review and sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the support workflow entirely within HubSpot, reducing tool switching and accelerating agent response times.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored as HubSpot form entries.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates customer-reported product issues from a high-volume channel into a structured dataset ready for analysis.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form data into a structured Google Sheet, appending new rows for each submission.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations and product teams a live, shareable view of customer issues to identify trends and prioritize fixes.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity for DFC customers who are visiting or engaging with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces warm buying signals in real time, giving the sales team a precise moment to reach out with high conversion potential.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an automated real-time alert to the DFC sales team via Teams message and email with the active customer's details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates manual monitoring of CRM activity and ensures sales reps act on buyer intent within minutes, not days.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts to handle inquiries, product questions, and support interactions.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide 24/7 automated customer engagement, reducing inbound support volume and improving response times.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings daily to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospecting that would otherwise require hours of manual research, generating a fresh lead list every day.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for each discovered business lead using email discovery tools.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach lands in real inboxes, maximizing deliverability and reducing bounce rates on cold campaigns.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates new contact and company records in HubSpot and sends a warm intro email about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Turns daily discovered leads into tracked outreach automatically, building a pipeline for the sublet without manual prospecting.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance into one feed, enabling unified analysis without manual report exports.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword actions.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Accelerates ad optimization cycles and surfaces non-obvious inefficiencies, improving ROAS across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces relevant creator candidates from YouTube's vast library without manual search, saving hours of research per campaign.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers and retrieves Instagram creator profiles and engagement data matching the same keyword and niche criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across platforms simultaneously, giving a fuller picture of available influencer talent.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes collected creator profiles across platforms and ranks them by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment with the campaign keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters signal from noise across hundreds of discovered profiles, delivering a curated shortlist of high-potential creators.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria including engagement rate, niche relevance, audience demographics, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Standardizes creator evaluation with consistent, objective scoring so teams can prioritize outreach based on data rather than gut feel.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-qualified creator lists, outreach sequence templates, and prompt libraries stored in Drive folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes creator data and messaging assets so the agent always works from the latest approved sequences without manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned sequences and brand-specific prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale that feels personal, increasing creator response rates without copywriter time per contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to each creator and logs delivery status back to the workflow.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting so partnership managers can focus on warm replies rather than cold sends.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes stored in Drive to build context for learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real past negotiations, making replies more accurate to brand voice and acceptable deal terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and surfaces the conversation thread and response content to Gemini for analysis.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator reply sits unanswered, maintaining momentum in negotiations without requiring constant inbox monitoring.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply against historical negotiation patterns and generates an appropriate counter-response or next-step message.
Creator Reponse.impact: Accelerates deal progression by responding to creators faster with contextually intelligent replies that mirror proven negotiation outcomes.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matched part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet matching that previously took hours, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds with zero lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates the Must Have Monday email in HubSpot, attaches the generated sales sheet and load sheet, and queues it for send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully built, campaign-ready email into HubSpot each week without manual template assembly or file attachment steps.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the email has been built and is ready for review or send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the marketing team instantly informed so they can approve and launch the campaign without checking multiple tools.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates launch-ready email copy, subject lines, and monthly recap narratives for new DFC product launches based on product input data.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Cuts email copywriting time from hours to minutes, enabling the team to launch First to Market campaigns the same day a product is confirmed.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates the email draft in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, attaches the corresponding sales sheet, and saves it to the appropriate campaign folder.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers a publish-ready HubSpot email draft with zero manual data entry, so marketers only need to review and schedule.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data from HubSpot for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Replaces manual HubSpot report exports and copy-paste into slides, saving significant prep time each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance data including send volume, CTR, and revenue attribution for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically incorporates SMS results into the deck so SMS performance is never omitted from monthly reporting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session data, conversion events, and channel attribution metrics from GA4 for the monthly period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Surfaces accurate digital performance numbers directly from the source, eliminating manual GA4 report pulls.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with all retrieved metrics, charts, and formatted data from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated, presentation-ready deck section each month, saving hours of manual slide formatting and data entry.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impression, click, and ranking data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Focuses content production on the highest-opportunity keywords, maximizing organic traffic gains per blog published.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, expert-level automotive content at scale without requiring in-house copywriters for each article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated and proper categorization applied.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes end-to-end content publishing automatically, turning keyword research into a live indexed page without manual CMS work.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, due dates, outstanding quantities, and order status for processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Replaces manual ERP report pulls and data formatting, giving the workflow a clean, structured starting dataset automatically.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Uploads transformed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in the chase email sequence.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs directly in the browser, matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide, and generates a formatted DFC load sheet.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched and formatted load sheet data as a structured Excel file ready for DFC submission.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the base for the new weekly campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and revenue figures for analysis.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on sales analysis and enrolls each segment in targeted email sequences.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Launches targeted SMS campaigns to high-priority customer segments identified in the sales analysis, such as lapsed buyers or high-LTV accounts.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking by automatically detecting when the new session file is ready, triggering the workflow instantly.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download URL.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures the latest session file is hosted and accessible, producing a fresh link ready to swap into the email.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, replaces the download link with the new file URL, and schedules send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to the full list without any manual editing or scheduling, saving 30–60 minutes of repetitive work each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's key audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword strategy and brand guidelines.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, audience-specific blog content at scale, compressing hours of copywriting into seconds and maintaining consistent SEO targeting.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes or stages it with proper formatting, categories, and SEO metadata.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently updated with optimized content that drives organic search traffic from high-value B2B buyers.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches vehicle background data from Wikipedia based on the submitted year/make/model.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting by instantly compiling all reference material, imagery, and factual vehicle data needed to produce a polished video package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and reference material to write a complete Friction Friday video script, including intro, product breakdown, performance narrative, and call to action.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready, on-brand script in seconds rather than hours, ensuring consistent tone and structure across every Friction Friday episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the AI-written script into a professional voiceover audio file using a selected voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers studio-quality narration without recording sessions or voice talent scheduling, cutting production time dramatically.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed script, voiceover file reference, thumbnail assets, and assembled video output via Apps Script webhook and logs the full package into a structured row for review and publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Creates a single source of truth for every video package produced, giving the team an organized queue of ready-to-publish Friction Friday episodes with all assets linked in one place.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows — including site visit triggers and welcome series — and audits them for logic gaps, redundancies, and enrollment criteria errors.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, purchase history, and account attributes from the Dream ERP system.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking data, impressions, clicks, and average position for all DFC blog posts.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and position data for all R1 Concepts blog content published by the agent.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly traffic and engagement data for R1 blog pages to measure audience behavior and content performance.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Queries R1's WordPress instance for total posts published, publishing dates, and content volume produced by the agent during the reporting month.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs and extracts the attachments for processing.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Produces a clean, legally-formatted signed invoice ready for vendor submission or internal filing without any additional manual steps.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks and identifies which DFC prospect pages are being visited and feeds that behavioral data into the workflow trigger system.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and routes them into the automation pipeline for classification and response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests so no ticket is missed and every issue enters a consistent, trackable resolution process.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Analyzes each ticket to classify the issue type, assess urgency, and generate a relevant draft response or resolution recommendation.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Reduces average ticket handling time significantly by eliminating manual triage and giving agents pre-built responses to review and send.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, assigns it to the correct team or auto-resolves it if confidence threshold is met.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Speeds up resolution cycles and ensures tickets land with the right team immediately, improving customer satisfaction scores.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and initiates the automated distribution workflow.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual handoff steps by using an existing communication channel as the workflow trigger, reducing launch prep time.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Uploads the new arrival product data to the DFC backend so inventory and product pages reflect the latest parts accurately.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrival product content, and schedules it for send to the email list.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence, automatically sending RFQ emails with relevant shipment requirements.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance metrics from all three paid ad platforms for aggregation and comparison.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the relevant team members every week on a consistent schedule.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts the full month's performance data across all paid channels for use in the monthly slide report.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures and formats the monthly data into slide-ready summaries, narratives, and key takeaways aligned to the existing reporting template.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Reduces monthly report prep from several hours to minutes, freeing media team time for strategy while delivering a polished, consistent output.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders formatted and ready to be dropped into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Ensures leadership receives a clean, presentation-ready report on time every month without last-minute scrambling.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty form and tags them as a qualified buyer in the CRM.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad copy and corresponding performance metrics from Meta and TikTok ad accounts for analysis.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, blockers, or upcoming deadlines across active projects.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps a continuous pulse on project status without requiring manual check-ins, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Asana Agent.action: Analyzes the current state of tasks and projects to identify priorities, risks, and items requiring attention or escalation.

Asana Agent.action: Sends a structured project status digest to relevant stakeholders highlighting key tasks, risks, and next steps.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting where tasks and action items are discussed.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates and assigns each extracted task in the correct Asana project with owner, due date, and description populated.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ad copy along with performance metrics such as CTR, conversion rate, and quality score for ads flagged as underperforming.

Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act report directly to the person who can implement changes, removing the need to log in to multiple platforms or compile findings manually.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Pulls the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, including all agent names, statuses, owners, build progress, and recent updates.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly summary organized by status, highlighting what's new, what's in progress, and what needs attention.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent status update to the relevant team members or leadership on a recurring schedule.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec — make, model, year, and relevant attributes — through a HubSpot form, triggering the automation workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Replaces back-and-forth emails or manual catalog requests with a single structured submission that instantly kicks off the entire process.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all parts DFC currently stocks for that application.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces what's in inventory for the vehicle without manual lookups across the catalog, giving a real-time picture of stock coverage.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Compares the Dream inventory results against the full catalog for that vehicle spec to identify what DFC stocks, what exists in the catalog but is missing from stock, and how to present these clearly in a formatted output.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Transforms raw inventory and catalog data into a structured, decision-ready gap analysis without any manual cross-referencing.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark a formatted Excel file attached to an email showing what DFC stocks for the requested vehicle and what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a polished, actionable catalog report directly to Mark within minutes of his submission, enabling faster quoting and sales conversations.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant effort and eliminating inconsistent status reads.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, flags parts with no on-hand, no order, and no in-transit status as dead-end items with no source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly prioritized backorder view that distinguishes solvable delays from true dead-ends, enabling faster customer response decisions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-populated with accurate status details based on the enriched report data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate backorder updates from hours of individual composition to near-instant draft generation, ensuring customers get timely and accurate information.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitment data including make, model, year, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor fitment data in minutes that would take days to gather manually, creating a comprehensive market reference for two-piece rotor coverage.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify which applications DFC already covers and which represent gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where new part development or sourcing opportunities exist, without manual spreadsheet comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data for applications where DFC currently has gaps in two-piece rotor coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns catalog gap analysis into active demand validation without any manual outreach effort, building a real-world demand signal to prioritize new part development.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, cross-reference results, coverage gaps, and customer response data into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, always-current document that replaces scattered spreadsheets and manual research, enabling faster product and sourcing decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns, including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and any other copy fields currently running.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of live ad copy in one pull, making it possible to audit at scale rather than reviewing individual ads platform by platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field against a list of specified phrases or patterns and flags any exact or close matches, noting the ad, field, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Replaces manual copy-by-copy review with an exhaustive automated scan, ensuring no flagged phrase slips through and delivering findings in a structured, audit-ready format.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field name and verbatim copy where each target phrase was detected.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable findings report that allows the team to immediately identify and address non-compliant or problematic copy without any further digging.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, detects whether a resume PDF is attached, and routes each email into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or sits unanswered, creating a reliable intake pipeline that handles volume without any manual inbox monitoring.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive organized by role and date, ensuring all candidate files are stored consistently and retrievably.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates lost or disorganized resume files and gives the hiring team instant access to every application in a clean, searchable file structure.

Resume Bot.action: Reads and scores each resume against the qualifications and requirements of open roles, producing a fit score and decision recommendation of approve, deny, or pause based on role availability.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts hours of recruiter screening time per week by delivering an objective, consistent first-pass evaluation for every applicant the moment their resume is received.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, resume link, and reply status to a dashboard sheet, with denied and approved candidates in the main tab and paused-role candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of the entire applicant pool and pending pipeline without any manual data entry, making it easy to revisit paused candidates when roles reopen.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now spanning 56 total agents — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. This week we welcomed one new addition: the **Resume Bot**, a daily agent that reads incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scores candidates against open roles using Claude, files PDFs in Drive, sends auto-replies, and logs all decisions to a Sheets dashboard. No agents changed stages this week, but the pipeline remains active and momentum is strong. Great work to everyone pushing these builds forward — the growing library of completed agents is a real testament to the team's execution!
